reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request introduces Redis-based caching for analytics data, adds a new `LazyImage` component for optimized image loading, and integrates it into the client and event dashboards. It also cleans up unused database indexes in the Prisma schema. I have provided feedback regarding a security risk in the Redis TLS configuration and a style guide violation regarding the use of static colors in the client list component.

## Code Review

This pull request introduces Redis-based caching for analytics and event data, adds a new 'LazyImage' component for optimized image loading, and cleans up unused database indexes in the Prisma schema. I have provided feedback regarding the use of non-blocking Redis commands, security concerns with TLS configuration, and adherence to the project's design system style guide for color variables.

## Code Review

This pull request introduces a Redis-backed caching system using ioredis and a custom LazyImage component to optimize image delivery via Cloudinary. It also updates the admin dashboard UI to align with the Aura Noir theme and adds thumbnail previews to the events list. Feedback focuses on performance risks from removing database indexes on foreign keys, logic errors in the LazyImage component regarding fallback sources and missing dimension units, and the use of the blocking KEYS command in Redis which should be replaced with SCAN for production stability.

## Code Review

This pull request introduces a Redis-based caching system and a LazyImage component to optimize performance and image rendering. It also updates UI elements to use theme-based color variables, adhering to the Aura Noir design system. Feedback includes a suggestion to use the LazyImage component for client avatars for better consistency and an improvement to the error handling logic within the cache invalidation utility.

## Code Review

This pull request implements a Redis-backed caching system and a new LazyImage component to optimize data retrieval and image loading. It also migrates the dashboard UI to use theme-aware Tailwind variables and removes redundant indexes from the Prisma schema. Review feedback highlights opportunities to improve maintainability by replacing magic numbers with constants, enhancing layout stability by refining default image dimensions, and ensuring full compliance with Next.js optimization standards by replacing raw HTML tags with framework-specific components.

## Code Review This pull request introduces a Redis-based caching layer for analytics, integrates DiceBear for client avatars, and implements a custom LazyImage component for optimized image loading. It also refactors Prisma indices and updates UI components to align with Tailwind v4 theme variables. Feedback includes addressing a style guide violation regarding static color usage, removing a redundant database index, improving environment variable naming to avoid CLI conflicts, and hardening the Cloudinary URL optimization logic.
I am having trouble creating individual review comments. Click here to see my feedback. ### src/app/(dashboard)/admin/clients/page.tsx (220-221) ![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg) Penggunaan kode warna statis seperti `amber-100` dan `amber-600` dilarang keras menurut pedoman gaya repositori. Seluruh elemen UI harus menggunakan variabel CSS berbasis OKLCH dari tema Tailwind v4 (misalnya `bg-primary`, `text-primary`, atau `bg-muted`). ```suggestion
```
References 1. DILARANG KERAS menggunakan kode warna statis warisan (seperti bg-white, text-slate-800, bg-gray-100). Gunakan secara eksklusif variabel CSS berbasis OKLCH dari @theme bawaan Tailwind v4. ([link](https://github.com/ylxai/hafiportrait-saas/blob/main/.gemini/styleguide.md))
### prisma/schema.prisma (127) ![low](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/low-priority.svg) Indeks tunggal pada `galleryId` bersifat redundan karena kolom ini sudah menjadi prefiks dalam indeks komposit `@@index([galleryId, order])` dan `@@index([galleryId, createdAt])`. Menghapus indeks redundan ini dapat sedikit meningkatkan performa operasi tulis tanpa memengaruhi performa kueri. ``` @@index([storageAccountId]) @@index([publicId]) @@index([galleryId, order]) @@index([galleryId, createdAt]) ``` ### src/lib/cache.ts (3) ![low](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/low-priority.svg) Untuk menghindari konflik autentikasi dengan Wrangler CLI selama pengembangan lokal, disarankan untuk menggunakan prefiks yang lebih spesifik seperti `NEXT_SERVER_` untuk variabel lingkungan sisi server, daripada nama generik seperti `REDIS_URL`. ```suggestion const REDIS_URL = process.env.NEXT_SERVER_REDIS_URL || ''; ```
References 1. To prevent authentication conflicts with the Wrangler CLI during local development, avoid environment variable names with generic prefixes like CLOUDFLARE_. Instead, use more specific prefixes, such as NEXT_SERVER_, for server-side variables.
### src/components/ui/lazy-image.tsx (59) ![low](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/low-priority.svg) Logika penggantian string `/upload/` untuk optimasi Cloudinary cukup rapuh. Jika URL tidak menggunakan format standar atau memiliki beberapa kemunculan `/upload/`, ini bisa menyebabkan hasil yang tidak terduga. Pertimbangkan untuk menggunakan regex yang lebih ketat atau library resmi Cloudinary SDK untuk manipulasi URL. ```suggestion return url.replace(/\/upload\/(v\d+\/)?/, '/upload/f_auto,q_auto/$1'); ```

## Code Review

This pull request implements a Redis-backed caching system, integrates Dicebear for client avatars, and introduces a LazyImage component to optimize image delivery using Intersection Observer and Cloudinary transformations. Additionally, the Prisma schema was updated to remove redundant indexes, and UI components were refactored to use theme-based color variables. Feedback suggests hardening the Cloudinary URL replacement logic with a more precise regex and adopting the NEXT_SERVER_ prefix for server-side environment variables to prevent local development conflicts.

## Code Review

This pull request introduces a performance optimization layer featuring a new LazyImage component with Cloudinary auto-format support, a Redis caching utility, and a migration of the Admin UI to semantic Aura Noir theme tokens. The review identifies a critical security risk where static cache keys in the analytics route could lead to multi-tenant data leakage. Other significant issues include a performance regression from removing the clientToken index, potential runtime errors when performing arithmetic on BigInt values, and the need for the unoptimized property when using Data URIs with next/image. Feedback also suggests refining the LazyImage dimension props and utilizing existing constants for cache TTL values.

## Code Review

This pull request introduces a codebase audit finding log and a corresponding task list, alongside significant architectural improvements including a new Redis-based caching layer and a `LazyImage` component for optimized asset delivery. The updates also include UI refinements to align with the Aura Noir OKLCH theme and schema optimizations in Prisma. Feedback is provided regarding data type consistency in the caching utility, potential performance regressions from index removals in the database schema, and adherence to style guides for BigInt serialization in API responses.
